insight: Lang JSON files (en_US.json, es_ES.json) ship bundled inside the jar and are NOT extracted to disk by default. Users customize them by running `/chc dumplocale` (alias `/chc dumploc`), which extracts the active locale (set via `Locale` key in settings.yml) to `plugins/ChatControl/lang/<locale>.json`. Subsequent runs sync missing/removed keys. To customize the `/chc broadcast chat` banner, edit `command-announce-chat-body` and `command-announce-chat-body-line-color` there.
